scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const p='package/node_modules/next/package.json';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){cp.execSync('npm install --prefix ./package --no-audit --no-fund',{stdio:'inherit'});}else{console.log('Dependencies already installed.');}"
scripts.prestart: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const p='package/node_modules/next/package.json';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){cp.execSync('npm install --prefix ./package --no-audit --no-fund',{stdio:'inherit'});}else{console.log('Dependencies already installed.');}cp.execSync('npm run build --prefix ./package',{stdio:'inherit'});"
